name: Patient 35
history: Difficult family conversation with mother about not discussing pain. Father avoids therapy and has distressing dreams about brother's suicide. Patient reports struggles with separation and suffering.
intermediate_belief: My family's emotional repression has damaged my ability to feel.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm emotionally numb because my family taught me feelings are dangerous.
coping_strategies: Discussing detachment, attempting to articulate emotions.
situation: Talking with Jeremy about feelings of disconnection. Attempting to articulate emotional detachment.
auto_thought: I can't even describe what's wrong because I feel so disconnected from my emotions.
behavior: Attempt to articulate emotional detachment to friend.
